title: Codex Review Finding
description: Structured output contract for codex-review reviewer skills. Diff-scoped code review only — no PRD/SDD/Sprint verdicts.

verdict.description: Code review verdict. Binary by design — bugs get fixed, not discussed.

findings.description: Code review findings. Each finding is line-anchored and includes an executable fix.

severity.description: Binary severity. If a finding does not warrant a fix, do not include it.

file.description: Path to the file containing the issue.

fixed_code.description: The exact replacement code that fixes the issue (fenced).

fabrication_check.description: Fabrication detection results. Flags hardcoded values, stubbed functions, faked results.

passed.description: True if no fabrication concerns detected.

concerns.description: Specific suspicious patterns observed in the diff.

original_issue.description: Brief description of the previous finding.

notes.description: If rejected, the implementer's reasoning and whether the reviewer accepts it.

iteration.description: Review iteration number (1 = first review, ≥2 = re-review).

auto_approved.description: True when iteration > MAX_ITERATIONS triggered API-level auto-approval (no model invocation).

note.description: Additional notes appended by the API wrapper (e.g., 'iteration-cap-reached').
